seoTitle: Cardiff Heights vs Carey Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cardiff Heights and Carey Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cardiff Heights vs Carey Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cardiff Heights and Carey Bay.
heading: Cardiff Heights vs Carey Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cardiff Heights, New South Wales and Carey Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cardiff Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Carey Bay (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cardiff Heights or Carey Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cardiff Heights has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Carey Bay scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cardiff Heights scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Carey Bay scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cardiff Heights or Carey Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cardiff Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
